Status: completed
Date: 2026-06-04

## Problem
Executor multiline patterns repeatedly corrupted `.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml`. The previous JSON attempt was truncated, so GitHub Actions reported a YAML syntax error on line 1.

## Change
The active workflow line was replaced with a complete single-line JSON document, which is YAML-compatible and includes `name`, `on.workflow_dispatch`, and `jobs`.

## Gate decision
Release PASS remains false until remote raw verification and GitHub Actions parser confirmation.

## Next
P12H remote raw verification.
